title: A NEW REAGENT FOR THE ESTIMATION OF MERCURY AND COPPER.
author: S. J. DAS-GUPTA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: 2-Chloro-7-methoxy-5-thiolacridine has been found to be a good reagent for the estimation of mercuric and cupric salts.
steps_raw: 2-Chloro-7-methoxy-5-thiolacridine has been found to be a good reagent for the estimation of mercuric and cupric salts.
